title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - CA-5
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: CA-5 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control CA-5 in the Assessment, Authorization, and Monitoring family. The control title for CA-5 is Plan of Action and Milestones. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: IA-5 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, IA-5, belongs to the Identification and Authentication family and is titled Authenticator Management. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
